---
title: "ALD_FDA_Dissertation"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

### GF

```{r}
library(data.table)
ald_dat <- fread("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")

# Setup
response_vars <- c("GF1", "GF2")
time_vars <- c("age1", "age2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GF_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```

```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```


### GAK
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GAK1", "GAK2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GAK_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```
```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

### GC
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GC1", "GC2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GC_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```
```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

### GQ
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GQ1", "GQ2")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 5 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep] - 500, Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GQ_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```
```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```

## NORA dataset

```{r}
ald_dat <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/nora_T3.dat", na.strings = ".", 
                      col.names = c("id", "times", "female", "age1", "age2", "age3", 
                                    "mr1", "mr2", "mr3", "bd1", "bd2", "bd3", 
                                    "cf1", "cf2", "cf3", "as1", "as2", "as3", 
                                    "fr1", "fr2", "fr3", "wvc1", "wvc2", "wvc3",
                                    "gvc1", "gvc2", "gvc3", "cvc1", "cvc2", "cvc3",
                                    "faWMc1", "faWMc2", "faWMc3"))
```
```{r}
library(data.table)
setDT(ald_dat)
response_vars <- c("fr1", "fr2", "fr3")
time_vars <- c("age1", "age2", "age3")

# Remove rows where any age < 5 and >22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | row >= 7 & row <= 22))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Construct Lt and Ly using lapply (with -500 shift)
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))
  list(Ly = y[keep], Lt = t[keep])
})
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)

```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 7:22
tfine <- seq(7,22, length.out = 16*12)
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal", eps = .5)
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/NORA_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```
```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = tfine, sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)
```
